positive: A symmetrical, central composition of a stylized celestial fox amidst a bioluminescent cosmic forest. The style is a fusion of Art Nouveau and highly detailed Neo-Tribal geometry, rendered with thick, clean black outlines and glowing, saturated neon accents (electric cyan, deep magenta, and ethereal gold). The fox should be depicted in a graceful, mythic pose, surrounded by swirling galaxies, geometric floral patterns, and stylized moon phases. Strong silhouette definition, high contrast against a deep void background. Composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for seamless textile printing, emphasizing flat, bold color fields and crisp edges. Studio-lit, vector illustration quality, high-detail linework.
negative: blur, low detail, smudges, noisy, watermark, signature, text, cropped, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, cartoon, realism, photorealistic
